# cameraDeviceCanSyncClock

**Type Property**

Indicates that the camera can synchronize its date and time with that of the host computer.

## Declaration

```swift
static let cameraDeviceCanSyncClock: ICDeviceCapability
```
title: cameraDeviceCanSyncClock
